While CVE-2025-10284 addressed git-specific RCE vectors, the underlying archive extraction path traversal was never fixed. On systems with GNU tar < 1.34 (Ubuntu 20.04, Debian Buster, CentOS 7, many Docker base images), a malicious archive can write files outside the intended extraction directory.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00208, "percentile": 0.10815}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T15:02:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-12565"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T23:17:02Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T15:02:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security/advisories/GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12565", "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/commit/4fb38fd6e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security-advisories/GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot", "summary": "BBOT: Path traversal (Zip-Slip) in unarchive module - incomplete fix for CVE-2025-10284", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T15:02:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vgw-585j-4m45", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "bbot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.3.1, <= 2.8.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: BBOT: Path traversal (Zip-Slip) in unarchive module - incomplete fix for CVE-2025-10284
